user.title: xAI Custom TTS
user.description: Configure your xAI API key from https://console.x.ai/team/default/api-keys

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please check your xAI API key.

abort.already_configured: xAI Custom TTS is already configured with this API key

init.title: Voice Profile Management

data.action: What would you like to do?

data_description.action: Choose an action to manage your voice profiles

add_profile.title: Add New Voice Profile
add_profile.description: Create a new voice profile. xAI provides 5 distinct voices: Eve (energetic female), Ara (warm female), Rex (professional male), Sal (neutral), and Leo (authoritative male).

data_description.profile_name: A unique name for this voice profile (e.g., 'Morning News', 'Bedtime Stories')
data_description.voice: xAI voice to use (Eve, Ara, Rex, Sal, or Leo)
data_description.language: Language code for speech (e.g., en, es, fr, de, auto for auto-detect)
data_description.codec: Audio codec: MP3 (compressed), WAV (uncompressed), PCM, or telephony formats (G.711)
data_description.sample_rate: Audio sample rate in Hz. Higher = better quality, larger file
data_description.bit_rate: Bit rate for MP3 compression. Higher = better quality, larger file (MP3 only)

modify_profile.title: Modify Voice Profile
modify_profile.description: Select a voice profile to modify

data_description.selected_profile: Choose which voice profile you want to edit

edit_profile.title: Edit Voice Profile
edit_profile.description: Modify the settings for this voice profile.

data_description.profile_name: A unique name for this voice profile (e.g., 'Morning News', 'Bedtime Stories')
data_description.voice: xAI voice to use (Eve, Ara, Rex, Sal, or Leo)
data_description.language: Language code for speech (e.g., en, es, fr, de, auto for auto-detect)
data_description.codec: Audio codec: MP3 (compressed), WAV (uncompressed), PCM, or telephony formats (G.711)
data_description.sample_rate: Audio sample rate in Hz. Higher = better quality, larger file
data_description.bit_rate: Bit rate for MP3 compression. Higher = better quality, larger file (MP3 only)

delete_profile.title: Delete Voice Profile
delete_profile.description: Select a voice profile to delete

data_description.profile_name: Choose which voice profile you want to remove permanently

error.profile_exists: A profile with this name already exists

get_voices.name: Get Voices
get_voices.description: Retrieve all available voices from xAI API
